ab: a adaman salrangan ku kani malri mukuwa mi muzazangiya kani ama na maralrak kani malri.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: i ama na maralrak kani malri mupanana tu kuwi.
intaw mumalr kaniniyam, na sa’uv mu mutravelang.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: intaw a temulralre’ay kana sa’uv mu, mutani kemay sa’usa’uv.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: i malri mada za ’alum za hung zi puran veray kani ama na maralrak kanintaw.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: inku zi maw i ama na maralrak kani malri kazu mi kanatu kiya’ezengan i savak mukuwa ku kimazayazayara, tu lrawa’ay ku kanantu kinazalram na sazu na umaumalren.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: a kirewaaday mi pakangaway mu, pulihu kaninku i ama za atras u lra, zi vangesar u lra kema.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: marengay ku, nu ’inava lra nu kuwi ama mu, alamu lra i ruma’ uzazangi.
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
